ddls:
CREATE TABLE "software_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each software product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the software product */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the creator of the software */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the platform the software runs on */,
  "first_release_year" INTEGER /* Year of the first public release */,
  "latest_version" TEXT /* Latest stable version of the software */,
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software license information */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the software product */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords for the software product */,
  "support_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for support */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is active */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Indicates the compliance status of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_products_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES creators ("creator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_products_license_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_id") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_software_products_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "creators" (
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each creator */,
  "creator_name" TEXT /* Name of the creator organization or individual */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the creator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the creator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the creator */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the creator */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the creator is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("creator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., Windows, cross-platform) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the platform */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system(s) supported by the platform */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the platform is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of software license (e.g., Proprietary, Eclipse Public) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL to the license documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the license */,
  "license_text" TEXT /* Full text of the license */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the license is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the software being released */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Detailed release notes */,
  "download_url" TEXT /* URL to download the release */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the release is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_releases_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software product */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the compliance report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the compliance report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance report (e.g., Compliant, Non-Compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage report */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the software product */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the usage report */,
  "report_text" TEXT /* Detailed text of the usage report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_reports_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES software_products ("product_id")
)
